description: A landscape of living stone and light where crystals grow like trees and the air vibrates with a frequency you feel in your teeth.
biomes: Rough walls studded with uncut gems that catch torchlight and throw it back in a thousand colored sparks.
Towering pillars of translucent crystal rising from the ground like frozen lightning. They ring when the wind blows.
Flat ground covered in low crystal formations that hum at different pitches. Walking through feels like crossing a vast instrument.
Deep channels cut through crystal bedrock where the sunlight splits into permanent rainbows hanging motionless in the air.
Formations that produce haunting tones as the wind passes through them. The melody shifts with the weather, never quite repeating.
Clusters of mineral growth in delicate branching patterns, fragile and beautiful. The colors are vivid and the shapes defy nature.
Hollow spaces lined with amethyst and quartz. The interior glitters in any light and the acoustics are startlingly perfect.
